title: mandevilla rugosa
intro: Mandevilla rugosa, also known as the wild mandevilla, is a type of flowering vine native to South America. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Mandevilla rugosa include its ability to help lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
